provisions.description: Constitution (UUD 1945) Article 28G -- right to personal protection, family, honour, dignity, and property; constitutional basis for personal data protection
PDP Law (UU No. 27/2022) Article 1 -- definitions of key terms including data pribadi (personal data), pengendali data pribadi (data controller), and prosesor data pribadi (data processor)
ITE Law (UU No. 11/2008) Article 1 -- definitions of electronic information and electronic transactions
Company Law (UU No. 40/2007) Article 1 -- definitions including Perseroan Terbatas (limited liability company)
Consumer Protection Law (UU No. 8/1999) Article 1 -- definitions including consumer (konsumen) and business actors (pelaku usaha)
PP No. 71/2019 Article 1 -- definitions related to electronic system operations and electronic transactions
